tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes or early diabetes, and low fasting glucose, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or tight glycemic control. LDL cholesterol is slightly elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and other lipid parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic management and cardiovascular risk assessment.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
